greeting: Peace be with you, traveller. The chapel is open to all.
You carry a heavy burden, I can see it. Rest here a while.
The Light watches over those who walk the road with honest hearts.
quest: An old shrine in the woods has fallen into disrepair. Would you help me gather stones to mend it?
idle: The hymns sound different in an empty chapel...
I should tend the garden before vespers.
